title: Smoky German Sausage with Pepper Curry
description: A hearty, flavorful dish featuring smoky German sausage, a spicy pepper curry, and a side of crispy vegetables.
instructions: 2. Slice the onions and bell peppers into bite-sized pieces.
3. In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat.
4. Add the sliced onions and bell peppers to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes.
5. Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
6. Add the sliced German sausage to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until browned.
7. Transfer the sausage to a baking sheet and bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes.
8. While the sausage is baking, mix together the smoked paprika, curry powder, salt, and black pepper in a small bowl.
9. After the sausage has baked for 5 minutes, brush the curry powder mixture evenly over the top.
10. Return the sausage to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes.
11. Serve the smoky German sausage with the spicy pepper curry on the side.
